description: Bridge between the cloakfox-shield popup and chrome-priv state (prefs, cloak_cfg, persona regeneration). Exposes a small read/write surface so the popup can preview and act on per-container persona without leaving the toolbar.

functions.name: getCloakCfg
functions.description: Return parsed cloak_cfg JSON for the given container plus a 6-hex-char seed tag derived from the master seed.

functions.name: regeneratePersona
functions.description: Roll a new master seed for the given container and rebuild cloak_cfg. Same code path as about:cloakfox's New persona button.
